Title: data-raf
Description: Demonstrates the data-raf module binding arbitrary logic executions directly into the native browser requestAnimationFrame loop for bleeding-edge 60FPS mathematically smooth logic.
Extensibility: Frame pipeline hooks inside src/modules/attributes/raf.ts execute directly 60 times a second natively. Optimize internal DOM nodes recursively to bypass AST latency during canvas renders.
